title: General
subtitle: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.
censorUsernameDescription: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
keyboardShortcutsDescription: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
aiFeedbackSharingDescription: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
noDefaultSaved: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
dontAllowDescription: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
devHint: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the feedbackDataSharingPreference key from the instance_settings.general JSON row for this instance, or set it back to "prompt". Unset and "prompt" both mean no default has been chosen yet.

language.label: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for the interface
